'''''Too Late Now''''' was a captured and modified [[Imperial Customs Frigate]] that was part of [[Drea Renthal]]'s [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] that was present at the [[Battle of Nar Shaddaa (4 BBY)|Battle of Nar Shaddaa]]. One of its [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]] turrets was replaced with an [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]], allowing it to disable [[Starship/Legends|ships]] for capture. It was instrumental in helping to destroy the [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class light cruiser]] [[Renthal's Vigilance|''Vigilance'']]. ''Too Late Now'' was destroyed by Imperial forces shortly thereafter.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Hutt Gambit]]''
